plugins.name: homeassistant
plugins.description: Home Assistant smart home integration — control lights, sensors, automations, scenes, scripts, and more via the HA REST API
plugins.author: aleksclark

versions.changelog: Initial release — 26 tools: states, services, events, history, logbook, config, templates, calendars, intents, automations, scenes, scripts.

plugins.name: radarr
plugins.description: Radarr movie collection manager — manage movies, search, queue, history, calendar, quality profiles, and more via the Radarr API
plugins.author: aleksclark

versions.changelog: Initial release — 22 tools: movies, calendar, queue, history, commands, status, quality profiles, root folders, tags, blocklist, wanted/missing.

plugins.name: sonarr
plugins.description: Sonarr TV series manager — manage series, episodes, search, queue, history, calendar, quality profiles, and more via the Sonarr API
plugins.author: aleksclark

versions.changelog: Initial release — 24 tools: series, episodes, calendar, queue, history, commands, status, quality profiles, root folders, tags, blocklist, wanted/missing.

plugins.name: lidarr
plugins.description: Lidarr music collection manager — manage artists, albums, search, queue, history, calendar, quality/metadata profiles, and more via the Lidarr API
plugins.author: aleksclark

versions.changelog: Initial release — 27 tools: artists, albums, calendar, queue, history, commands, status, quality/metadata profiles, root folders, tags, blocklist, wanted/missing.

plugins.name: readarr
plugins.description: Readarr book collection manager — manage authors, books, search, queue, history, calendar, quality/metadata profiles, and more via the Readarr API
plugins.author: aleksclark

versions.changelog: Initial release — 29 tools: authors, books, calendar, queue, history, commands, status, quality/metadata profiles, root folders, tags, blocklist, wanted/missing.

plugins.name: prowlarr
plugins.description: Prowlarr indexer manager — manage indexers, search across all indexers, sync with Sonarr/Radarr/Lidarr/Readarr, download clients, and notifications
plugins.author: aleksclark

versions.changelog: Initial release — 25 tools: indexers, search, applications, indexer proxies, status, tags, download clients, notifications.

plugins.name: agents
plugins.description: ARP agent registry and A2A agent interaction — manage projects, workspaces, spawn/stop agents, send messages, discover agents, and route by skill
plugins.author: aleksclark

versions.changelog: Initial release — 21 tools: project lifecycle, workspace management, agent spawn/stop/restart, A2A messaging, proxy discovery, skill-based routing.
